name: Marketing

metadata.typical_owner_role: Head of Marketing / VP Marketing / Marketing Operations
best_practices: Use consistent UTM parameters across all campaigns
Update lead scores based on engagement signals
Pass MQLs to sales within 1 hour of qualification
Track both first-touch and multi-touch attribution
Archive completed campaigns but retain data for YoY analysis
